tech_news.title: Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch update 22.0.0 out now, patch notes - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch just got a new firmware update with version 22.0.0 and here are the patch notes including Friend List notes.

tech_news.title: Mayor Wilson pauses city employees’ sanctioned use of AI - The Seattle Times
tech_news.description: Seattle was on track to start using Microsoft CoPilot after a test program of 500 employees, but there are internal concerns over the potential to leak private and sensitive information.

tech_news.title: One of S.F.’s biggest tech conferences saw attendance plunge 30% this year - San Francisco Chronicle
tech_news.description: One of San Francisco’s biggest tech conferences saw its attendance plunge 30% this year, amid tech layoffs and fears of traveling

tech_news.title: New Pokemon Winds and Waves beta screenshot leaked - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: Here's another look at Pokemon Winds and Pokemon Waves, coming to Nintendo Switch 2 in 2027, with a new beta screenshot leak.

tech_news.title: Tekken 8 Season 3 patch notes - EventHubs
tech_news.description: It's already been more than two years since Tekken 8 released, and the game is getting its second major overhaul now.Bandai Namco has now released the official patch notes for the big Season 3 update coming tonight.

tech_news.title: NVIDIA DLSS 5 Delivers AI-Powered Breakthrough in Visual Fidelity for Games - NVIDIA Newsroom
tech_news.description: NVIDIA today unveiled NVIDIA DLSS 5, the company’s most significant breakthrough in computer graphics since the debut of real-time ray tracing in 2018.

tech_news.title: You can now add the bookmarks bar to Chrome on Android tablets, foldables - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: Google is updating Chrome on Android tablets and foldables to be more like the desktop version by adding the bookmarks bar.

tech_news.title: iOS 26’s new Phone app has a feature I don’t ever want to go without - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Apple overhauled the Phone app in iOS 26 with a new design and added several powerful features, including a new call screening option.

tech_news.title: Hasbro CEO thinks the video game industry needs to "think about things differently" - GamesIndustry.biz
tech_news.description: Hasbro CEO, Chris Cocks, believes the video game industry needs to "think about things differently."

tech_news.title: iPhone Fold looks like two of my all-time favorite products in one - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: Rumors make it seem clear that iPhone Fold will combine two of my favorite products—iPhone mini and iPad mini—into a single device.
